impact: The daemon prompt includes PP&D daemon markdown context, so this gives the next worker deterministic recovery instructions without touching domain artifacts: inspect the committed fixture shape, validate against actual keys, keep the proposal to one syntax-valid test file, and avoid broad contracts or live crawl code.
summary: Add a supervisor repair guide that constrains the next PP&D daemon retry to fixture-shape-first recovery for the blocked public-crawl validator.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 4 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
